title: bolboschoenus maritimus subsp. compactus
intro: Bolboschoenus maritimus subsp. compactus, also known as compacted sea club-rush, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Cyperaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory infections, as well as to promote wound healing. Bolboschoenus maritimus subsp. compactus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to exploit its health benefits.
